title: Sharp Key Signatures
description: Learn the order of sharps and how to identify major keys from G to B.

sessions.title: Father Charles Goes Down
sessions.description: Learn the exact order that sharps appear in a key signature.

sessions.title: The Up-A-Half-Step Trick
sessions.description: Learn the shortcut to identify any sharp major key.

levels.criteria: Can instantly name a major key by looking at its sharp signature.
